title: Stop Alt-Tabbing: Your Notes Are Now Playable
description: Experience a data-native VTT that turns your lore into a playable space with zero setup, instant rendering, and total privacy.

title: Why Codex Cryptica Takes a Different Approach Than Obsidian
description: Why Codex Cryptica is shaped around worldbuilding from the start, instead of asking you to assemble the workflow yourself.

title: The Front Page: Your World's Living Briefing Room
description: See your world at a glance with a front page that brings together the briefing, pinned notes, recent activity, and cover art in one place.

title: From Lore Bible to Living Graph: How the Import Feature Works
description: A deep dive into the Codex Cryptica import pipeline — from dropping a PDF onto the screen to having a fully linked, AI-extracted knowledge graph ready for your next session.

title: Your AI Co-GM: A Complete Guide to the Lore Oracle's Superpowers
description: From instant dice rolls to AI-powered story tension analysis and image generation, discover every command the Lore Oracle has to offer and how to use them to run richer sessions.

title: Supercharged Discovery: Mastering Filters and Labels in your Codex
description: Turn your pile of notes into a high-definition world. Learn how to use labels and smart filters to uncover hidden patterns in your campaign.

title: The Ultimate Guide to Mastering Codex Cryptica
description: Everything you need to know to build, manage, and synchronize your RPG campaign world using our local-first architecture.

title: The GM's Guide to Data Sovereignty: Your World, Your Files
description: Why 'Local-First' is the most important feature you didn't know you needed for your RPG campaign and how to keep your data private and portable.

title: Spatial Intelligence: How your Map, Graph, and Canvas Work Together
description: A campaign is more than just a list of names. Discover how Codex Cryptica links your Map, Graph, and Canvas to give you a 4D view of your world-building.
